languages.text: "Я нахожу справедливым полагать, что те, кто принадлежит к высокому и почитаемому клану, имеют некоторые привилегии перед теми, кто едва умеет читать. Наши аугменты требуют тщательной проверки, так как напрямую связаны с {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}машинным духом{/g} вокс-станций корабля".

traits.locale_text: "Я нахожу справедливым полагать, что те, кто принадлежит к высокому и почитаемому клану, имеют некоторые привилегии перед теми, кто едва умеет читать. Наши аугменты требуют тщательной проверки, так как напрямую связаны с {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}машинным духом{/g} вокс-станций корабля".
traits.speaker: MB_Old_Officer

languages.text: "I find it fair to assume that those who belong to a high and esteemed clan have some privileges over those who can barely read. Our augments require careful maintenance as they are directly connected to the {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirit{/g} of the ship's vox-stations."
languages.original_text: "Я нахожу справедливым полагать, что те, кто принадлежит к высокому и почитаемому клану, имеют некоторые привилегии перед теми, кто едва умеет читать. Наши аугменты требуют тщательной проверки, так как напрямую связаны с {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}машинным духом{/g} вокс-станций корабля".

traits.locale_text: "I find it fair to assume that those who belong to a high and esteemed clan have some privileges over those who can barely read. Our augments require careful maintenance as they are directly connected to the {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirit{/g} of the ship's vox-stations."

"I find it fair to assume that those who belong to a high and esteemed clan have some privileges over those who can barely read. Our augments require careful maintenance as they are directly connected to the machine spirit of the ship's vox-stations."

"I find it fair to assume that those who belong to a high and esteemed clan have some privileges over those who can barely read. Our augments require careful maintenance as they are directly connected to the machine spirit of the ship's vox-stations."

languages.text: 「高貴な家系に属する者は、読み書きができない者よりも特権を持つと考えるのは妥当でしょう。我々の増幅器は、艦のヴォックス・ステーションの機械霊と直接接続されているため、慎重にメンテナンスする必要があります」
languages.original_text: "I find it fair to assume that those who belong to a high and esteemed clan have some privileges over those who can barely read. Our augments require careful maintenance as they are directly connected to the machine spirit of the ship's vox-stations."

languages.text: "Yüksek ve saygın bir klana mensup olanların, okuma yazmayı zar zor bilenlere kıyasla bazı ayrıcalıklara sahip olduğunu varsaymanın adil olduğunu düşünüyorum. Ogmentlerimiz, geminin voks istasyonlarının {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}makine ruhuna{/g} doğrudan bağlı oldukları için dikkatli bakım gerektiriyor."
languages.original_text: "I find it fair to assume that those who belong to a high and esteemed clan have some privileges over those who can barely read. Our augments require careful maintenance as they are directly connected to the {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirit{/g} of the ship's vox-stations."

traits.locale_text: "Yüksek ve saygın bir klana mensup olanların, okuma yazmayı zar zor bilenlere kıyasla bazı ayrıcalıklara sahip olduğunu varsaymanın adil olduğunu düşünüyorum. Ogmentlerimiz, geminin voks istasyonlarının {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}makine ruhuna{/g} doğrudan bağlı oldukları için dikkatli bakım gerektiriyor."

languages.text: “我认为，出身高贵家族之人相对那些目不识丁之人，理应享有某些特权。我们的植入物直接连接着舰船音阵通讯站的{g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}机魂{/g}，需要精心维护。”
languages.original_text: "I find it fair to assume that those who belong to a high and esteemed clan have some privileges over those who can barely read. Our augments require careful maintenance as they are directly connected to the {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirit{/g} of the ship's vox-stations."

traits.locale_text: “我认为，出身高贵家族之人相对那些目不识丁之人，理应享有某些特权。我们的植入物直接连接着舰船音阵通讯站的{g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}机魂{/g}，需要精心维护。”

languages.text: "Ich möchte doch meinen, dass Mitglieder eines hochgestellten und angesehenen Clans gewisse Privilegien gegenüber Leuten haben, die kaum lesen können. Unsere Augmentationen müssen sorgfältig gewartet werden, da sie direkt mit dem {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}Maschinengeist{/g} der Voxstationen des Schiffes verbunden sind."
languages.original_text: "I find it fair to assume that those who belong to a high and esteemed clan have some privileges over those who can barely read. Our augments require careful maintenance as they are directly connected to the {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirit{/g} of the ship's vox-stations."

traits.locale_text: "Ich möchte doch meinen, dass Mitglieder eines hochgestellten und angesehenen Clans gewisse Privilegien gegenüber Leuten haben, die kaum lesen können. Unsere Augmentationen müssen sorgfältig gewartet werden, da sie direkt mit dem {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}Maschinengeist{/g} der Voxstationen des Schiffes verbunden sind."

languages.text: « Il me semble tout à fait à naturel que les membres d'un clan prestigieux tel que le nôtre bénéficient de certains privilèges par rapport à ces va-nu-pieds analphabètes. Nos augmentations étant directement reliées à l'{g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}esprit de la machine{/g} des postes-vox du vaisseau, il convient de les entretenir avec le plus grand soin. »
languages.original_text: "I find it fair to assume that those who belong to a high and esteemed clan have some privileges over those who can barely read. Our augments require careful maintenance as they are directly connected to the {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirit{/g} of the ship's vox-stations."

traits.locale_text: « Il me semble tout à fait à naturel que les membres d'un clan prestigieux tel que le nôtre bénéficient de certains privilèges par rapport à ces va-nu-pieds analphabètes. Nos augmentations étant directement reliées à l'{g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}esprit de la machine{/g} des postes-vox du vaisseau, il convient de les entretenir avec le plus grand soin. »

languages.text: «Considero lógico suponer que los integrantes de un clan noble y estimado tienen algunos privilegios frente a quienes apenas pueden leer. Nuestros aumentos requieren un mantenimiento cuidadoso, ya que están conectados directamente al {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}espíritu máquina{/g} de las estaciones de voco de la nave».
languages.original_text: "I find it fair to assume that those who belong to a high and esteemed clan have some privileges over those who can barely read. Our augments require careful maintenance as they are directly connected to the {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirit{/g} of the ship's vox-stations."
